projectDescription: A Claude Code skill that enables AI agents to produce high-fidelity HTML design artifacts — slide decks, interactive prototypes, landing pages, UI mockups, animations, and brand style clones — through a structured design workflow with screenshot-based verification.
keyFeatures: Structured 7-step design workflow: Understand → Route → Acquire Context → Design Intent → Build → Verify → Deliver
Progressive loading of 68+ brand design systems from getdesign.md (Stripe, Vercel, Apple, Tesla, etc.)
Three-phase verification via Playwright MCP (structural, visual, design excellence)
React + Babel inline JSX prototyping with pinned versions and component scope management
In-page tweaks system for real-time design variant exploration with localStorage persistence
Export to PPTX, PDF, and self-contained inline HTML via Node.js scripts
7 starter templates: slide deck, design canvas, iOS/Android frames, macOS/browser chrome, animations
12+ on-demand reference documents for minimal context window usage
Design excellence quality framework with emotional tone targeting and anti-slop rules
Compatible with Claude Code (primary) and OpenAI/Codex-compatible platforms
publicApiSurface: SKILL.md — skill definition loaded into Claude Code context
Routing table — maps task types to references and templates
scripts/gen_pptx.js — HTML to PPTX export script
scripts/super_inline_html.js — HTML + assets to single inline file
scripts/open_for_print.js — HTML to PDF via Playwright
references/design-excellence.md — visual quality framework and checklist
references/react-babel-setup.md — React/Babel pinned versions and scope rules
